hints.threads: Number of databases to check in parallel.
hints.label: Optional display name shown in notifications and the dashboard instead of the item key.
hints.conn_type: How to reach the MySQL/MariaDB server: TCP direct connection, Unix socket file, or TCP tunnelled over SSH.
hints.host: IP address or hostname of the MySQL server. Used for TCP and SSH tunnel modes.
hints.port: TCP port MySQL is listening on (default 3306). Used for TCP and SSH tunnel modes.
hints.socket: Full path to the Unix domain socket file (e.g. /var/run/mysqld/mysqld.sock). Used only in socket mode.
hints.ssh_host: Hostname or IP of the SSH jump server.
hints.ssh_port: SSH port on the jump server (default 22).
hints.ssh_password: Password for the SSH connection. Leave empty when using a key file.
hints.ssh_key: Path to the SSH private key file. Takes precedence over the SSH password when both are set.
